# Sheen Mode Copilot Instructions

- Use Next.js App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.
- Keep the site focused on a single product: Ghanal Hair Oil.
- Prefer premium natural styling with green, beige, gold, white, and brown tones.
- Use MongoDB Atlas through `MONGODB_URI` in `.env.local` for persistent data.
- Use Cloudinary for image uploads through the API route in `src/app/api/upload/route.ts`.
- Keep checkout simple and include delivery charge handling.
- Reuse shared content from `src/lib/site-data.ts` before adding duplicate constants.
- Keep components small, readable, and reusable.
- Update the README and environment example when new setup variables are added.
